go 1.24

require (
	github.com/anthropics/anthropic-sdk-go v1.26.0

input.command:
echo "result" >> .gitignore 2>/dev/null; git add flake.nix flake.lock nix/package.nix nix/module.nix .gitignore && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add flake.nix for Nix-native building and NixOS service module

Provides buildGoModule package, dev shell with Go tooling, a NixOS
module for deploying reel-life as a systemd service with security
hardening, and an overlay for consuming flakes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh pr create --title "Add flake.nix for Nix builds and NixOS service module" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Add `flake.nix` with `buildGoModule` package, dev shell (go, gopls, golangci-lint, gh, git), overlay, and NixOS module
- Add `nix/module.nix` — NixOS service module with configurable options for Sonarr URL, chat backend, agent model, monitor settings, log config, and secret environment files via `environmentFiles`
- Systemd service includes security hardening (DynamicUser, ProtectSystem=strict, NoNewPrivileges, etc.)
- Add `nix/package.nix` — separated package derivation callable via the overlay

## Test plan
- [x] `nix build` succeeds and produces working binary
- [x] `nix flake check` passes all checks
- [x] `nix develop -c go test ./...` — all existing tests pass
- [x] Built binary responds to `-h` flag correctly

Run: 20260328-1617-05cd

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"

content.text:
PR created: https://github.com/patflynn/reel-life/pull/1

Here's what was added:

- **`flake.nix`** — Nix flake with `packages.default` (buildGoModule), `devShells.default` (go, gopls, golangci-lint, gh, git), `overlays.default`, and `nixosModules.default`
- **`nix/package.nix`** — Separated package derivation with correct vendorHash
- **`nix/module.nix`** — NixOS module exposing `services.reel-life` with options for all config knobs, `environmentFiles` for secrets, and a hardened systemd service definition

All verified: `nix build`, `nix flake check`, and `nix develop -c go test ./...` pass.

result:
PR created: https://github.com/patflynn/reel-life/pull/1

Here's what was added:

- **`flake.nix`** — Nix flake with `packages.default` (buildGoModule), `devShells.default` (go, gopls, golangci-lint, gh, git), `overlays.default`, and `nixosModules.default`
- **`nix/package.nix`** — Separated package derivation with correct vendorHash
- **`nix/module.nix`** — NixOS module exposing `services.reel-life` with options for all config knobs, `environmentFiles` for secrets, and a hardened systemd service definition

All verified: `nix build`, `nix flake check`, and `nix develop -c go test ./...` pass.
